sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 20:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 20:1
items.html: The difference between them is only in the screen: It exists in the straightness and not in the circles. (Part Two, Chapter One, Inner Light, Item 2)
